Summarize the proposal in a few sentences.

## Security / Consensus Considerations

Describe risks related to:

- Safety
- Liveness
- Fork-choice
- Finality
- Validator behavior
- Slashing
- DoS resistance
- Cryptographic assumptions

## Backward Compatibility

Is this change breaking or non-breaking?

- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Non-breaking change
- [ ] Migration required
- [ ] Unsure

## Testing Strategy

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
